title: Beyond the Attention Stability Boundary: Agentic Self-Synthesizing Reasoning Protocols
summary: As LLM agents transition to autonomous digital coworkers, maintaining deterministic goal-directedness in non-linear multi-turn conversations emerged as an architectural bottleneck. We identify and formalize a systemic failure mode termed...
